character.name: ShardWalker
character.prompt: fractured humanoid figure made of separated broken stone shards with clearly visible dark gaps between every shard, the gaps between shards glow with vivid blue-purple rift energy light visible through the cracks, body is NOT solid but visibly split apart held together only by rift energy, arm raised to throw a shard, jagged irregular silhouette with floating debris around body, cold grey stone shards with bright glowing blue-purple rift energy visible in every gap between them, dark fantasy roguelite enemy, RIMA universe
